query:
SELECT
  COUNT(*) as total_services,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avcId IS NOT NULL AND avcId != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_avc,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlyCost IS NOT NULL AND monthlyCost > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cost,
  SUM(CASE WHEN locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_address,
  SUM(CASE WHEN speedTier IS NOT NULL AND speedTier != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_speed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN provider IS NOT NULL AND provider != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_provider,
  SUM(CASE WHEN serviceActivationDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_activation_date
FROM services
WHERE serviceType IN ('Internet', 'Data', 'Voice', 'Mobile');
